Private In-Home Homeschool Help in Southern Maine

THRIVE

For the family who wants to work directly with a child and youth development specialist inside your home to build a routine rooted in your reality and create a system your entire family can follow.

Apply Now

Let me take all of the routine planning, research & curriculum development off your plate and build a homeschool system that actually works in your real life so you can focus on doing what you love the most — being a calm, present parent.

You've decided — homeschooling is definitely the path that's right for your family.

But with your busy schedule and all of the logistics of homeschooling multiple children, are you overwhelmed at the thought you're not able to give your children the intentional, high-quality education they deserve by yourself?

Mama, you don't have to do it alone. I'm here to help.

There's no doubt in your mind that homeschooling is what's right for your family.

As a business owner & entrepreneur yourself, you've recognized from the get-go that public school is only geared to help kids succeed in a regular 9-5 job.

You want more for your kids. You want your kids to take classes on topics they're actually interested in, learn financial literacy early, have business and leadership skills ingrained in them (just in case), and be set up to succeed in whatever they choose to do later in life — or whatever happens in this world; you want them to be set with skills, talents, intelligence, and confidence to thrive in life with or without mainstream education.

I understand and relate to why you've decided that homeschooling is the way to go.

And good for you, mama! You should feel proud for choosing to do what's right for you and your family.

But I also know that homeschooling on your own can be a lot. Especially if you have other little ones at home, you and/or your husband are growing a successful company, or homeschooling is simply new for you — it can be a LOT to juggle!

You don't want to send your kid(s) off to a co-op to be taught by someone else. Or sit them in front of a computer to learn from some private online school. You want to be their primary teacher. But you definitely don't have the time or space for all of the logistical planning, curriculum development, keeping track of assignments, etc.

This is where I come in to help you design a system your child(ren) and entire household can actually follow.

Imagine This

For the next year,
having my support to...

  • Build a system your entire household can follow — so whether it's you, your spouse, a nanny, or a grandparent… your homeschool still runs!
  • Track your child's progress using REASSURED™ — a developmental observation system that helps you understand your child and know exactly what to do next.
  • Give you top-level support from a teacher who has served 40+ homeschooling families using my signature Peace of Mind Process to build your homeschool based on your values and your children's interests.
  • Provide you with checklists, templates, and assignments organized for you — so you can have something to show for your children's learning and feel confident when you deliver the lessons to your children, and they take you seriously.
  • Help you establish a daily homeschool rhythm that works with multiple children so you're no longer being pulled in all directions all day — giving you more time to focus on family dinners, finding homeschool friends, adventures outside, and creating core memories together!
  • Plan your educational activities to be personalized to your child so that they enjoy learning and you are productive. No more searching Pinterest last second or tearing apart your cabinets hoping you have the right supplies. Let me plan it all in advance for you, so you can simply be present with your child.

This is more than just curriculum support. This is where your homeschool finally starts working in real life.

What Families Are Saying

This is what's possible when you say yes
to joining me inside THRIVE.

12 months of personalized homeschool support.

"Both of my children received a well-rounded, organized, and intentional education for their specific needs. Maria took the immense pressure off of our shoulders! Maria is thoughtful with every curriculum decision she makes for your child, based on parent feedback and what the future looks like for the child. As an example, our daughter was homeschooled for almost 3 years and her desire was to start public high school in 9th grade. Maria got her up to speed with 8th grade public school requirements and curriculum so she would be prepared."

Kristin

"As a homeschool parent, The Homeschool Admin helped me gain the confidence that I needed. Working with her I was able to focus on my child's progress all while having organization and structure. If you're considering hiring The Homeschool Admin, you should know she helps to create a schedule for each individual child and allows me, the parent, to feel more relaxed and confident while homeschooling. Maria is so easy to work with and I would recommend her to any homeschooling family who wants to stay organized."

Aimee

"It is so much easier for my son to navigate his day and he's actually having more fun learning. He's in charge of his learning process and has a fantastic mentor and support. Maria helped him grow; creating a beautiful resume with him and offering a sense of ease and confidence that is not offered in public schooling. My son has told his friends this experience; he feels good about the person he is and about his future."

Shannon

"If it wasn't for Maria, I probably would have never chosen to do this. Maria took the stress away from having to plan how I was going to keep track of everything. Homeschooling is scary but honestly the scariest part is just taking that first step."

Amber

Whether you have a child about to turn 6, multiple children, a high schooler, or if you've already started and need a new perspective through relearning how to teach as you break away from the systems (deschooling) — this is for you!

We can start anytime, even if it's in the middle OR end of the year!

1 Full Year of Mentorship Includes

Everything inside
THRIVE.

4 × Home Visits

Visit 1

Orientation where we observe, (re)build, and refine your daily rhythm together.

Visit 2

Full household system design so everyone can support your homeschoolers.

Visit 3

Real-time implementation support based on your actual days.

Visit 4

Prep for your end of the year review and get ahead by starting to prepare for the year ahead.

Choose Your Track

Intensive Support  or  Extensive Support

Intensive Support

For close guidance & consistent refinement

  • 4 consecutive monthly in-home visits
  • Hands-on adjustments as your homeschool evolves
  • Higher level proximity and support builds in each visit
Extensive Support

For structure with space to implement

  • Quarterly in-home visits
  • System design with room to lead day-to-day independently
  • Continued guidance as needed throughout the year

What you walk away with.

Done-With-You Documentation Portfolio

A prepped portfolio to document state-required subjects — attendance tracker, end-of-year checklists, and more. The hard copy of documentation we build together all year.

Custom Family Routine and Individual Child Agendas

A one-page, editable digital daily agenda — predictable yet flexible — built to rotate and manage everything needed to accomplish your homeschooling goals.

REASSURED™ Developmental Tracking System

Clear insights into your child's development across key domains — with a tailored plan for what to do next in literacy, math, social-emotional skills, and more.

12 Months of Direct Chat Channel Access

The highest level of support I offer. Flesh out ideas in real time, voice challenges, get quick encouraging empowerment when you need it. Open 24/7 — expect a response within 24 hours.

Choose Your Track

Either way you go, you get 6 in-home visits included — just structured differently to fit your family's pace.

🏃 Fast Track

Monthly Home Visits

Prefer to get grounded quickly? The Fast Track gives you 6 monthly home visits in the first 6 months — so we build your rhythm fast and you're confidently rolling by mid-year.

🎵 Rhythm Track

Bimonthly Home Visits

Want steady, ongoing support all year? The Rhythm Track spaces your 6 home visits bimonthly across the full 12 months — consistent check-ins as your year unfolds.

About Maria

Maria Galyean,
Master of Leadership

A former teacher and nanny who uses her experience and expertise coupled with her education in child and youth development and leadership to bring families real, in-home homeschool support across Southern Maine.

Founder of:

  • The Homeschool Admin
  • ME Homeschool Enrichment Experiences
  • Your Turn: Self-Development Mastermind
  • FGCU Dance Company

You chose this for your children.
Let's build it so it lasts.

If you have questions and are feeling drawn to work together with me as your homeschool assistant in this high-touch program, send me a voice message on Instagram at @thehomeschooladmin. Let me know you've been thinking about one of these exclusive spots and ask me anything you need clarity on.

From there, we'll have a simple voice message chat about what you're looking for, the support you need, and whether this is the right fit. If it's not the best match, I'll share other options that might be a better fit. If it is, I'll send over the contract, payment link, and all the details to get started.

Looking forward to hearing from you!
